description: LeadSquared is a sales and marketing automation platform that unites sales, field, and service teams on one AI-driven system, trusted by 2,000+ businesses.
tagline: AI-driven platform uniting sales and marketing
overview: LeadSquared is a comprehensive sales and marketing automation platform that brings sales, marketing, field, and service operations together on a single AI-powered system. It automates workflows, personalizes customer engagement at scale, and integrates with 100+ tools, helping businesses reduce manual tasks and accelerate revenue growth.
what_is: LeadSquared is a sales and marketing platform built for revenue-focused teams. It unifies sales, marketing, field operations, and customer service on a single AI-driven system, automating workflows and personalizing engagement across every stage of the customer journey. More than 2,000 businesses rely on it to increase conversion rates and scale their operations.

The platform performs best when managing sales pipelines, coordinating field force visits, running marketing campaigns, and handling customer service queues in parallel. Automation reduces manual workload by up to 70%, which accelerates lead follow-ups and shortens response times across the board. A library of 100+ pre-built integrations covering CRM, email, and scheduling tools ensures data moves smoothly through the full technology stack from day one.

LeadSquared is not designed for complex ERP functions or financial accounting workflows. Its strength lies in connecting sales, marketing, and service activities under one roof, making it a strong choice for businesses that need rapid, AI-supported growth across customer-facing operations.
